title: libanotis ugoensis var. kurilensis
intro: Libanotis ugoensis var. kurilensis is a plant species commonly referred to as a type of caraway or sea-holly, belonging to the Apiaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Libanotis ugoensis var. kurilensis include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and act as a natural diuretic. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and alleviate specific health concerns.
